= Icons =
[[:Category:Icons]]

A page just to put commonly used Icons.

== Specialty Icons ==
There are several other pages in the [[:Category:Icons]] group.

Specialty Icons can be found on the following pages:
* [[Icons/Altar]]
* [[Icons/Cosmetics]]
* [[Icons/Domain]]
* [[Icons/Early Game]]
* [[Icons/Emojis]]
* [[Icons/Events]]
* [[Icons/Food]]
* [[Icons/Forms]]
* [[Icons/Fragments]]
* [[Icons/Gene Simulation]]
* [[Icons/Journey to the West]]
* [[Icons/Minigames]]
* [[Icons/Organs]]
* [[Icons/Pistil]]
* [[Icons/Protomon]]
* [[Icons/Reward Packs]]
* [[Icons/Species Map]]
* [[Icons/Species War]]
* [[Icons/Time Beacon]]
* [[Icons/Treasure Collection]]
* [[Icons/Wonder Fungus]]

= [[Cathay Generals]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Byakko Spirit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Genbu Spirit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Seiryuu Spirit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Suzaku Spirit}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Prestige}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Akhal-Teke}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bronze Tripod}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Reishi}}
|}

= Coating =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Coating|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Coating|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Coating|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Coating|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Coating Bucket|orange}}
|}

= Currency =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ad Ticket}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ancient Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Badge|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Basic Data Unit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Chore Stamp}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Decor Coin|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Drone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Drone Core}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Feast Ticket}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Fluorite}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Game Controller}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Gear RF}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Glue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Healing Potion}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Iridescent Scroll}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Iridescent Ticket}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lucky Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lucky Star}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lucky Voucher}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ma'at Sand of Time}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Magic Potion}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Maneater Affinity}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Museum Medal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Neurolink}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Normal Star Pattern}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Organ Collection Voucher}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Punch Point}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Quantum Gel}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rainbow Point}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Relic RF}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Resplendent Star Pattern}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Season Point|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Sim Token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Snail Honor}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Star Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Star Sketch}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Star Stone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Taichi Fish}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tainted B-Tad}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Toner}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Weekly Special Stamp}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wormhole Shard}}
|}

== Printing Supplies ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Engineering Printing Supply}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Military Printing Supply}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|}

= Forms =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Angel Form Icon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Demon Form Icon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragon Form Icon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mecha Form Icon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mutant Form Icon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Zombie Form Icon}}
|}

= [[Fridge]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Analysis Chip}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Cultivation Fluid}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mutagen Serum}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mutation Core}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Cultivation Fluid}}
|}

= Gems =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|ART Gem}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|CIV Gem}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|FAME Gem}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|FTH Gem}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|TECH Gem}}
|}

= [[Home Resources]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ancient Fossil}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ancient Wood}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stone Green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stone Blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stone Purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stone Orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Wood Green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Wood Blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Wood Purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Wood Orange}}
|}

= [[Lottery_Machine|Lottery Machine No. 1]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Machine No. 1}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|White Bead}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Bead}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Bead}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Bead}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Bead}}
|}

= [[Lottery_Machine#Lottery_Machine_No._2|Lottery Machine No. 2]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Machine No. 2}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|White Bead II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Bead II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Bead II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Bead II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Bead II}}
|}

= [[Lottery_Machine#Lottery_Machine_No._3|Lottery Machine No. 3]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lottery Machine No. 3}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|White Bead III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Bead III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Bead III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Bead III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Bead III}}
|}

= [[Maneater]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Insect Feed|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fish Feed|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Animal Feed|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sunny Plant Food|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Digestive Pill|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Maneater Affinity}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mysterious Seed}}
|}

= [[Club|Manuals]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Angel Manual}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Demon Manual}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dragon Manual}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mecha Manual}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mutant Manual}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Zombie Manual}}
|}

= [[Minion Sim]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Anomaly Frag}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|N377 Tool Kit|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithGearlink|Blue|War|Disk of Regeneration}}
{{IconExampleRowWithGearlink|Blue|War|White Oaken Shield}}
{{IconExampleRowWithGearlink|Purple|War|Trumpet Shell}}
{{IconExampleRowWithGearlink|Orange|War|Sanskrit Tablet}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Common Record|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rare Record|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Precious Record|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Unknown Record|blue}}
|}

= Misc =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Current Species War Chest}}
|}

= Reagents =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Reagent|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Reagent|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Reagent|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Reagent|orange}}
|}

= [[Realms]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Koryeo}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Yamato}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Cathay}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Murika}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Britland}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Kemet}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Hellas}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Bharata}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Time Rift}}
|}

= [[Realm Traits]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Deadly Ironball}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Sacred Mirror}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Supreme Warlord}}||aka Lu Bu
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lady Liberty}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ghost Ship}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ma'at Tablet}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Cosmos}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dragon Horse}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Deadly Ironball Tome}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mirror Frag}}
|}

= [[Salesman]] =
Items the [[Salesman]] can sell
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|73 Disinfectant}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ayden Disc}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bonley Fast Drying Paint}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dispolo Body Wash}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Electric Fishing Net|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Face Wash}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Golden Pickaxe|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gundan Drone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Hand Cream}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Johns Baby Powder}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mr Tough Cleaner}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Organic Feed}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Philosopher Soap|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Schrodinger's Gel}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Snail Figure|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Spaceship Model|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stone Toy Bricks}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Super Power Glue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tyreal Shampoo}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Wood Toy Bricks}}
|}

= Speedups =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Chore Speedup}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Clone Speedup}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gene Speedup}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Offering Speedup}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Refine Speedup}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Travel Speedup}}
|}

= [[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|True Power]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|True Power I}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|True Power II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|True Power III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|True Power IV}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|True Power V}}
|}

= [[Unknown Creature]] =
* [[File:Unknown Creature.png|150px|frameless]]
* [[File:Unknown Creature Portrait.png|100px|frameless]]
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mystery Gloop}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Rainbow Gloop}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rainbow Pig's Gene Segment}}
|}

= [[Vending Machine]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Angel Cat Food}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Demon Cat Food}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mecha Cat Food}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mutant Cat Food}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Zombie Cat Food}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cat Food}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cat Vomit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cat Vomit I}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cat Vomit II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cat Vomit III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fortune Cat Part}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Game Controller}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fortune Cat Part}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Small Bowl}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Small Collar}}
|}

= [[Value_Packs#Consumer_Value_Pack|Whale Power]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Whale Power I}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Whale Power II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Whale Power III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Whale Power IV}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Whale Power V}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Whale Power VI}}
|}

[[Category:Cathay]]
[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Lottery Machine]]
[[Category:Maneater]]
[[Category:Minion Sim]]
[[Category:Realm]]
